sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89668" key="pro/skthsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρόσ-κτησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n89668.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">increase of fortune</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:3:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.61</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῆς ἀρετῆς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:11p.442M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11p.442M.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
